hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.adb|*.ads) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; GCC=$(ls -d "$HOME"/.local/share/alire/toolchains/gnat_native_*/bin/gcc 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); GCC=${GCC:-gcc}; out=$("$GCC" -c -gnats -gnat2022 -gnatX -gnaty3abcefhiklnprStux -gnatyM120 "$f" 2>&1); if [ -n "$out" ]; then jq -n --arg ctx "Ada style check on $f:
$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$ctx}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
